title: barleria glandulostamina subsp. pseudohumilis
intro: Barleria glandulostamina subsp. pseudohumilis, also known as the "False Humilis Barleria", is a plant species in the Acanthaceae family, native to tropical regions. This plant is traditionally valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of Barleria glandulostamina subsp. pseudohumilis include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as having anti-cancer properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, and its leaves can be used fresh or dried for medicinal purposes.
